title: lundellianthus guatemalensis
intro: Lundellianthus guatemalensis, also known as the Guatemalan daisy, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae), native to the tropical regions of Central America. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which are attributed to its essential oils and terpenoids. Lundellianthus guatemalensis is used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections, due to its health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and topical creams, and is also used in traditional remedies, such as tinctures and decoctions.
